_comment: Branch protection for `main`, as code. Apply with `ops/apply-branch-protection.sh`.
_why: Declarative source of truth. The GH UI diverges silently; this JSON + the apply script gives a diffable history of every rule change. Review rule intentionally 0 while repo is solo-owner (see G1 audit).

required_pull_request_reviews._comment: Solo-owner repo; every PR would otherwise need bypass. Raise to 1 as soon as a second maintainer exists.
